blocking_findings.summary: Wave 3 W3.1-W3.5 parallel agents all edit scripts/autorun/run.sh — file-level race; sequence or single-owner.
W3.4 calls is_clean_for_merge with 3 args; W3.4b wires 4th later — predicate evaluates wrong in gap. Reorder or merge.
W3.4b baseline-capture site unowned; must be captured at run start (W3.1) or R1 guard is defeated.
AC#13 ↔ D6 contradiction: AC says drift detector never halts; D6 halts on privilege elevation. Reconcile.
Banner stream contradiction: D10 says stderr [-t 2], R7 says stdout [-t 1]. Pick stdout, strike D10 line.
followups_added counter must be slug-scoped (grep slug filter), not wc -l; pin path, diff method, missing-file behavior.
Partial order pr/clean/validated undefined — D6 asymmetric halt non-deterministic. Pin pr ≡ validated_today < clean.
Two-event audit lacks join key — promote ts_run_start or run_id to required on both events; fixture pairing two same-slug runs.
pr_create_failed fixture trio lacks classification contract — collapse to one or add details.pr_create_stderr_class enum.
AC-R2 (split start/end events) has no crash-between fixture — split-event value unverified.
AC#3 constitution-only precedence layer has no fixture in W2.8 — add it or amend AC.
is_clean_for_merge truth table missing — 4 axes / 24 cells; named-AC fixtures don't cover combinatorics. Add truth-table fixture.

security_findings.summary: SA-1: Codex-absent treated as CODEX_HIGH_COUNT==0 vacuously passes clean-policy auto-merge — bypass of entire reviewer axis on Codex outage. Add CODEX_RAN guard.
SA-2: MERGE_POLICY_DISPATCH_OVERRIDE unguarded — stale env var in CI/dev shell silently redirects dispatch while audit row says auto_merged. Gate on MONSTERFLOW_TEST_MODE=1.

SA-3: PR body embeds reviewer-summary content (attacker-influenceable) — downstream LLM consumers prompt-injectable via embedded check-verdict fence. Wrap in 4-backtick fences, NFKC-normalize, hard-fail on check-verdict substring.
